testDiff_getNSigners_getSignaturesVsChec.notice: Test that for a given set of signatures:         1. safe.checkNSignatures() succeeds         2. the getSigners() method returns the expected signers         3. the expected signers are all owners of the safe.         Demonstrating these three properties is sufficient to prove that the getSigners()         method returns the same signatures as those recovered by safe.checkNSignatures().

Test that for a given set of signatures:         1. safe.checkNSignatures() succeeds         2. the getSigners() method returns the expected signers         3. the expected signers are all owners of the safe.         Demonstrating these three properties is sufficient to prove that the getSigners()         method returns the same signatures as those recovered by safe.checkNSignatures().

documentation.text:
@title SafeSigners_TestInit
 @notice Reusable test initialization for `SafeSigners` tests.

@notice Test that for a given set of signatures:
         1. safe.checkNSignatures() succeeds
         2. the getSigners() method returns the expected signers
         3. the expected signers are all owners of the safe.
         Demonstrating these three properties is sufficient to prove that the getSigners()
         method returns the same signatures as those recovered by safe.checkNSignatures().

@title SafeSigners_GetNSigners_Test
 @notice Tests the `getNSigners` function of the `SafeSigners` library.
